playlist.title: From Paradise Garage to UK Garage — The Evolution
playlist.description: A Discogs-verified journey tracing dance music's 'garage' lineage: from Larry Levan's Paradise Garage and Tony Humphries' Club Zanzibar (the New Jersey sound), through the US garage-house records the UK imported, to speed garage and 2-step. Every track anchored to a real Discogs release page; YouTube links sourced from those pages. Built with the discogs-playlist skill.
